originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Merging PR Fixes and Advising on Observation Representation for War Drones
summary: Worked on merging a pull request with extraneous formatting changes and a pre-commit hook that broke the Linux build. Advised Captain on compressing entity and tile observations for a war drones environment, proposing a 21x21 uint8 map with bit-packed channels for walls, agents, and projectiles.
